revision.comment: Bot: created missing page [[Talk:Chokusaisha]] redirect to enwiki [[Talk:Chokusaisha]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: remove deleted category Automatic wikipedia redirects
Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:勅祭社, en:Chokusaisha); add local discussion section + dated import note

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Chokusaisha here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Chokusaisha for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:59, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/20141192 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:59, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:勅祭社 | revid=20141192 --> 准勅祭社＝東京十社ではない筈です。東京十社は、皇室・宮内庁・神社庁は関係なく、一部の関係者のみで決めたことなんではないでしょうか・・・ それに准勅祭社は、日枝神社・根津神社・芝神明宮・神田神社・白山神社・亀戸神社・品川貴船社・富岡八幡神社・王子神社・赤坂氷川神社・六所神社・鷺宮神社です。 さらに、品川貴船は荏原神社のことです。すると、東京十社の品川神社って何なんでしょうか・・。正しい歴史は後世のために必要なことです。karzu999--[[User:Karzu999|Karzu999]] 2008年6月9日 (月) 08:54 (UTC) :他記事でも出典を示さず自己主張だけされているようで、信用できません。出典を示せば済む話です。[[WP:V]]、[[Wikipedia:出典を明記する]]を参照ください。--[[User:Fromm|fromm]] 2008年6月9日 (月) 12:08 (UTC)
== Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1206673335 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:59, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: en:Talk:Chokusaisha | revid=1206673335 --> {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Stub|1= {{WikiProject Japan|importance=mid|shinto=yes}} {{WikiProject Architecture|importance=low}} }}
